highlights.text: This got us long and I wrote at 4:20PM Monday “I have added long exposure a little after the close ~6396 as we put in a nice Failed Breakdown of the 6396 low set at 2:40PM.” I also wrote: “My general lean though is always to defer to the trend.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
The cycle is as follows: ES puts in an “elevator down” sell where it flushes violently in a straight down manner, through every level.
Then, after every “elevator down” sell, ES puts in an equally violent squeeze.
This squeeze is - in turn - always caused by my core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
Specifically ES undercuts a low rapidly during the “elevator down” sell, traps shorts, then squeeze the other way.
It then went “elevator down” at 830AM to 6454.
This Failed Breakdown assisted ES in painting a clear flag on the chart, mostly 6469 to 6490s.

As long as it holds though (and if we do sell, bulls want to see no lower than a Failed Breakdown of today’s low), we simply continue up after with 6507, 6518, then 6528 targets.” We sold down to 6469 today, and spend most the day bouncing off it, testing it 6x.

post_title: SPX Closes At New All Time Highs. Continuation, or Collapse Next Week? Aug 18 Plan
